title: Michael Matheson - Cabinet Secretary for NHS Recovery, Health and Social Care, and, prior to that, Cabinet Secretary for Net Zero, Energy and Transport, Scottish Government - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Ambassador, Highland Renewables  Mr Matheson received advice on taking up an unpaid role with Highland Renewables.  This advice was considered and provided by ACOBA before it closed on 12 October 2025. The Independent Adviser has not had a role in determining this advice.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Mr Matheson before its closure.  The Scottish Government has published a factsheet about the process under the Business Appointment Rules for former Scottish Government ministers following ACOBA’s closure. "
